title: bot: NIE_TEXT env var comment says 'bytes' but take(1024) counts chars
description: bot/src/main.rs:168-174: The comment says 'limit to 1024 bytes' but the code does .chars().take(1024) which limits to 1024 Unicode scalar values (not bytes). For CJK text or emoji, 1024 chars can be 3-4x more bytes than the comment suggests. The env var is passed to user hook scripts. If a hook has a per-line size limit expecting 1024 bytes, it may get more. Fix: update the comment to say 'limit to 1024 characters' or change the limit to use a byte-counting approach.
